SEO isn't about gaming the system or fooling the search engines into placing your business website at the top of the search results. It's all about creating quality content that is relevant to the topic being searched and building links from other reputable websites.

Search engine optimization cost can vary substantially. They range from free to hundreds of thousands of dollars per month. The best way to minimize your costs is to build out content in bulk and establish partnerships with high-domain-authorized sites.

- SEO is a critical part of a business website
